name: Enabling 24-hour Agricultural Robotics: Unsupervised Day-to-Night Cross-Modal Image Translation for Nighttime Visual Navigation
summary: arXiv:2607.12065v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: While visual navigation has been extensively studied in agricultural robotics, most existing systems assume daytime conditions. In fact, deploying...
description: arXiv:2607.12065v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: While visual navigation has been extensively studied in agricultural robotics, most existing systems assume daytime conditions. In fact, deploying autonomous robots at night offers significant advantages, including 24-hour crop and soil monitoring, fruit harvesting, and nocturnal pest detection. Modern vision-based systems, however, rely heavily...
author: Robel Mamo, Rajitha de Silva, Grzegorz Cielniak, Taeyeong Choi
